name: Glacier Ridge Sports Park
address: 4618 W Ridge Rd Suite 1, Spencerport, NY 14559
about: Glacier Ridge Sports Park is an indoor golf and multi-sport facility located in Spencerport, NY. The venue offers golf simulator rentals and services, with a driving range open Monday through Friday from 9am to 3pm. It features various amenities and activities, including facility rentals, indoor golf, and a fitness room. The facility operates within a large air structure dome with specific protocols and safety measures in place. Pricing is based on field rental for indoor golf time, with options for full and half-field rentals.
why_golfers_like_it: Flexible field rental options for solo or group practice
Structured environment with clear rules and protocols

food_and_drink.notes: ABSOLUTELY NO food inside Dome. No outside food or drink allowed in facility.

faq.answer: The provided content does not specify whether you need to bring your own clubs or if rentals are available.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food or drink is not allowed in the facility. ABSOLUTELY NO food inside the Dome.

faq.answer: The content does not provide information on the duration of an 18-hole simulator session.

faq.answer: Yes, the venue offers youth leagues and is available for junior participation, indicating a kid-friendly environment.
